questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Subqueries?
options: Inefficient scaling of Scalar subqueries, multi-row subqueries (IN, ANY, ALL).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Scalar subqueries, multi-row subqueries (IN, ANY, ALL).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Scalar subqueries, multi-row subqueries (IN, ANY, ALL) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
